data.title: To please customers, shippers find more ways to fulfill orders
data.description: A new study finds that high-volume small-parcel shippers are using strategies to like fulfilling from multiple distribution centers to meet customers’ delivery expectations. They’re also finding ways to cut operating costs while improving visibility into shipping status.

data.title: After a tough year, Do it Best enters deal to buy rival True Value
data.description: Under an agreement the two home improvement and hardware merchants have entered into, Do it Best would acquire all the business operations of the 4,500-store True Value chain. For Do it Best, the deal marks the largest of several recent moves to expand its multichannel business.

data.title: Revlon names former CVS executive as its new CEO
data.description: Michelle Peluso officially takes on the role Nov. 4, replacing interim Revlon CEO Liz Smith, who will remain the board’s executive chair.

data.title: How Fastenal will push digital to hit $10 billion in total sales
data.description: The industrial products distributor — which does over 60% of its sales digitally — is taking several steps to better coordinate its sales channels and boost its annual growth rate. Pictured: a Fastenal FASTVend vending machine at an Onsite customer location.

data.title: Nike veteran executive returns to the field as general manager of North America
data.description: Nike is bringing back veteran Tom Peddie, who — like CEO Elliott Hill — returns as a trusted executive as the retailer seeks a turnaround.
